title: A Guideline-Aware AI Agent for Zero-Shot Target Volume Auto-Delineation
abstract: arXiv:2603.09448v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Delineating the clinical target volume (CTV) in radiotherapy involves complex margins constrained by tumor location and anatomical barriers. While deep learning models automate this process, their rigid reliance on expert-annotated data requires costly retraining whenever clinical guidelines update. To overcome this limitation, we introduce OncoAgent, a novel guideline-aware AI agent framework that seamlessly converts textual clinical guidelines into three-dimensional target contours in a training-free manner. Evaluated on esophageal cancer cases, the agent achieves a zero-shot Dice similarity coefficient of 0.842 for the CTV and 0.880 for the planning target volume, demonstrating performance highly comparable to a fully supervised nnU-Net baseline. Notably, in a blinded clinical evaluation, physicians strongly preferred OncoAgent over the supervised baseline, rating it higher in guideline compliance, modification effort, and c

Title: A Guideline-Aware AI Agent for Zero-Shot Target Volume Auto-Delineation
Abstract: arXiv:2603.09448v2 Announce Type: replace-cross  Abstract: Delineating the clinical target volume (CTV) in radiotherapy involves complex margins constrained by tumor location and anatomical barriers. While deep learning models automate this process, their rigid reliance on expert-annotated data requires costly retraining whenever clinical guidelines update. To overcome this limitation, we introduce OncoAgent, a novel guideline-aware AI agent framework that seamlessly converts textual clinical guidelines into three-dimensional target contours in a training-free manner. Evaluated on esophageal cancer cases, the agent achieves a zero-shot Dice similarity coefficient of 0.842 for the CTV and 0.880 for the planning target volume, demonstrating performance highly comparable to a fully supervised nnU-Net baseline. translated_title: 一种基于指南感知的零样本靶区自动勾画AI智能体
translated_abstract: 放射治疗中勾画临床靶区（CTV）涉及受肿瘤位置和解剖屏障约束的复杂边界。虽然深度学习模型可以自动化这一过程，但每当临床指南更新时，它们对专家标注数据的刚性依赖需要昂贵的重新训练。为克服这一限制，我们提出了OncoAgent，一种新颖的基于指南感知的AI智能体框架，能够以无需训练的方式将文本临床指南无缝转换为三维靶区轮廓。在食管癌病例上的评估显示，该智能体在零样本条件下对CTV实现了0.842的Dice相似系数，对计划靶区实现了0.880，性能与完全监督的nnU-Net基线高度可比。值得注意的是，在一项盲法临床评估中，医生更偏好OncoAgent而非监督基线，在指南依从性、修改工作量等方面给予更高评价。
tldr: 提出了一种无需训练、基于临床指南文本直接生成三维靶区轮廓的AI智能体，在食管癌零样本勾画中达到与监督学习模型相当的性能，且医生评估更优。
en_tdlr: Proposed a training-free AI agent that directly generates 3D target contours from clinical guideline text, achieving performance comparable to supervised models in zero-shot esophageal cancer delineation with higher physician preference.
